description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, both of which fit closely to the body. The figure is barefoot, with toes and feet clearly visible, and the legs are straight and parallel. The facial features are defined, with short, neatly styled hair. The overall appearance is casual and suitable for an urban environment, such as a sidewalk or park.
description: An adult male in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, barefoot and with short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, chest, and the full front of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shirt, shorts, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
